\begin{circuitikz}
    % Place logic gates
    \draw (0,0)             node[xor port, number inputs=2](xor1){}
    ([xshift=0.5cm] xor1.out) 
                            node[xor port, number inputs=2, anchor=in 1](xor2){}
    ([yshift=-1.5cm] xor2)  node[and port, number inputs=2](and1){}
    ([yshift=-1.5cm] and1)  node[and port, number inputs=2](and2){}
    ([xshift=2.5cm,yshift=-0.75cm] and1)
                            node[or port, number inputs=2](or1){}
    
    % Full-adder inputs
    (xor1.in 1)             to[short] ++(-1.5,0) coordinate(A)
                            node[left](){$A_n$}
    (xor1.in 2)             to[short] (A |- xor1.in 2) coordinate(B)
                            node[left](){$B_n$}
    (and1.in 1)             to[short] (A |- and1.in 1) coordinate(Cin)
                            node[left](){$C_{n-1}$}

    % Internal connections
    (xor1.in 1)             to[short, *-] (\tikztostart |- and2.in 1)
                            to[short] (and2.in 1)
    ($(B)! 0.67!(xor1.in 2)$)
                            to[short, *-] (\tikztostart |- and2.in 2)
                            to[short] (and2.in 2)
    (xor1.out)              to[short] (xor2.in 1)
    (xor1.out)              to[short, *-] (\tikztostart |- and1.in 2)
                            to[short] (and1.in 2)
    (xor2.in 2)             to[short,-*] (and1.in 1)
    (and1.out)              to[short] (\tikztostart |- or1.in 1)
                            to[short] (or1.in 1)
    (and2.out)              to[short] (\tikztostart |- or1.in 2)
                            to[short] (or1.in 2)

    % Full-adder outputs
    (or1.out)               to[short] ++(.5,0) coordinate(Cout)
                            node[right](){$C_n$}
    (xor2.out)              to[short] (\tikztostart -| Cout)
                            node[right](){$S_n$}
    ;

    % Draw circuit boundary
    \draw[thick] ([xshift=0.5cm,yshift=0.5cm] A) 
                            rectangle ([yshift=-1.5cm] or1.out)
    ;
\end{circuitikz}
